description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image. Add a job named test:cargo in the default test stage that runs the script commands: rustup default nightly-2020-04-06, rustup show, rustc --version && cargo --version, rustup component add rust-src, cargo test --all, and cargo bench --all. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
